ShellCheck 0.11.0 binary release
================================

This directory vendors the upstream ShellCheck 0.11.0 binary release archive
for x86_64 Linux hosts.

The vendored archive is:

    shellcheck-v0.11.0.linux.x86_64.tar.xz

It was downloaded from:

    https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/releases/download/v0.11.0/shellcheck-v0.11.0.linux.x86_64.tar.xz

The unpacked archive root is expected to be:

    shellcheck-v0.11.0/

The ShellCheck entrypoint used by runme.sh is:

    shellcheck-v0.11.0/shellcheck

The corresponding source release is available from:

    https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/archive/refs/tags/v0.11.0.tar.gz

ShellCheck is licensed under the GNU General Public License, version 3. The
release archive includes LICENSE.txt.

SHA256:

    8c3be12b05d5c177a04c29e3c78ce89ac86f1595681cab149b65b97c4e227198
